title: Night of Joy
body:
# Night of Joy

Denver-area band; played Rhinoceropolis on April 16, 2010, alongside Fissure Mystic. Acknowledged in credits for a 2012 album release, indicating ongoing scene connection.

## Connection to Colin

Track 16 of REMIX10: **"NIGHT OF JOY-TAKEME2URDEALER (bong spit mix)"** — Colin's "bong spit mix" of "TakeMe2URDealer." The April 2010 Rhinoceropolis bill puts Night of Joy at Colin's home venue eight months before REMIX10's December 2010 release.
